The Albion Story
"Albion" — the oldest name for Britain. A word that carries centuries of craft and character.

Founded in 2024 with a singular belief: that fine clothing should be made with intention, worn with pride, and passed down with meaning. Every Albion garment begins with the finest British-sourced wools and linens, cut and finished by craftspeople who understand that true luxury is measured in decades, not seasons.

We are not a fast fashion brand. We do not follow trends. We make things that last, for people who value what endures.
